title: Create: Cog HUD
body:
This mod replaces the default HUD with a Create-style look. The health bar will rotate like a cog transmission. You can toggle the display of different HUD modules through the config file.

![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c437f3c6cb8489ad46bbdf1367e114d667250ae.png)
